reason: NSE F&O Regulation 2.3.1 states that the F&O Segment operates on all days except Saturdays, Sundays, and declared Exchange holidays. Regulation 2.3.2 permits separately notified unscheduled openings; explicit reviewed date entries override this recurring contract.
